tasks.title: Add canonical C coverage matrix
tasks.detail: Create a new module returning classification tables for every schema variant in C_BACKEND_DESIGN.md: MoonType Type/TypeRef/ArrayLen, MoonTree View/IndexBase/Place/Expr/Stmt/Func/ExternFunc/ConstItem/StaticItem/TypeDecl/Item/control-region products, relevant MoonCore UnaryOp/BinaryOp/CmpOp/LogicOp/MachineCastOp/Intrinsic/AtomicOrdering/AtomicRmwOp. Each entry must be {status='supported'|'unreachable'|'rejected', reason=..., section=...}; no generic default entries.
tasks.evidence: Added `lua/moonlift/c_coverage.lua` with explicit supported/unreachable/rejected entries for MoonType TypeRef/ArrayLen/Type, MoonTree View/Domain/IndexBase/Place/Expr/Stmt/Func/ExternFunc/ConstItem/StaticItem/TypeDecl/Item/control products, and MoonCore Unary/Binary/Cmp/Logic/SurfaceCast/MachineCast/Intrinsic/AtomicOrdering/AtomicRmwOp. Focused check run: `luajit -e 'package.path="./lua/?.lua;"..package.path; local c=require("moonlift.c_coverage"); assert(c.classification("MoonTree.Expr","ExprLit").status=="supported"); assert(c.classification("Expr","ExprDot").status=="rejected"); print("ok")'`.

tasks.title: Add schema exhaustiveness test
tasks.detail: Add a standalone test that introspects ASDL sums from schema/tree.lua, schema/type.lua, and schema/core.lua and asserts c_coverage.lua classifies every variant supported/unreachable/rejected with non-empty reasons for unreachable/rejected. Fail on extra stale entries. Cover Expr lines 529-753, Stmt 756-865, Func 868-912, Item 1002-1050, Place 194-227, View 92-143, Type 41-88.
tasks.evidence: Added `tests/test_c_backend_coverage_matrix.lua`, which builds the ASDL schema context, introspects required sums from MoonType/MoonTree/MoonCore, validates every `c_coverage.lua` entry has valid status/section/reason, and fails on missing or stale extra entries. Focused check run: `luajit tests/test_c_backend_coverage_matrix.lua`.

tasks.title: Extend CBackend ASDL for storage semantics
tasks.detail: At c_type.lua after CBackendTypeDecl lines 169-193 and before atoms line 254, add CBackendResidence (Value, Addressed, Aggregate, Descriptor), CBackendPlace (Local, Global, Deref, Field, Index, Bytes), CBackendLocalStorage with id/name/type/residence/init_state/address_taken, and place-aware aggregate/array/zero init stmt variants. Keep products/sums explicit and unique where appropriate.
tasks.evidence: Extended `lua/moonlift/c/c_type.lua` with `CBackendResidence`, `CBackendLocalInitState`, recursive `CBackendPlace` variants (Local/Global/Deref/Field/Index/Bytes), `CBackendLocalStorage`, aggregate/array init entry products, and place-aware statement variants for load/store/zero/aggregate/array initialization. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua && luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua && luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Extend CBackend ASDL for ABI and descriptors
tasks.detail: Extend type/signature area around lines 120-158 with descriptor type variants for fixed arrays, slices, views, closures, ABI lowered params/results, hidden out params, and exact imported C signature ids. Add function linkage/ABI role fields if needed so internal generated functions, externs, exports, declarations, wrappers, and indirect call typedefs cannot mismatch.
tasks.evidence: Extended `lua/moonlift/c/c_type.lua` CBackend type/signature schema with fixed array, slice/view/closure descriptor, hidden-out pointer, and exact imported C code-pointer type variants. Added explicit ABI/linkage products and roles (`CBackendFuncLinkage`, param/result roles, `CBackendFuncAbi`) without changing existing scaffold constructors. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua && luajit tests/test_type_to_c.lua && luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua && luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Extend CBackend ASDL for helpers and atomics
tasks.detail: Extend helper kind area lines 318-387 with unary, bool-normalize, cast, pointer offset, atomic load/store/rmw/cas/fence, layout assertion, memset/memcpy typed-size forms, and target-feature requirement nodes. Preserve existing helper variants or migrate tests accordingly.
tasks.evidence: Extended `lua/moonlift/c/c_type.lua` helper schema with target feature requirements, layout assertion product, unary/bool-normalize/cast/pointer-offset helpers, atomic load/store/rmw/cas/fence helpers, and typed memcpy/memset helpers while preserving existing helper variants. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua && luajit tests/test_c_helpers.lua && luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua && luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Extend validation issue schema
tasks.detail: Extend CBackendValidationIssue lines 525-637 with typed issues required by design §19: coverage classification missing, invalid target feature, layout assertion missing/mismatch, place type mismatch, load/store mismatch, unmaterialized address-taken value, uninitialized local, helper signature mismatch, exact data init precision/reloc failure, ABI mismatch, unsupported/unreachable construct diagnostics.
tasks.evidence: Extended `lua/moonlift/c/c_type.lua` `CBackendValidationIssue` with typed coverage, target feature, layout assertion, place/load/store mismatch, address-taken/uninitialized local, helper signature, exact data precision/reloc, ABI mismatch, unsupported construct, and unreachable construct diagnostics. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua && luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Make scalar layout target-aware
tasks.detail: Modify scalar_layout/class_layout/type_layout_result around lines 20-127 to accept optional target/options with pointer_bits/index_bits; rawptr/index/callable/pointer/view/slice/closure layout must derive from target pointer/index size. Native64 remains current default. Reject/diagnose unsupported target sizes rather than silently assuming 64-bit.
tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/type_size_align.lua` so scalar raw pointers, index, pointer/callable, slice/view/closure descriptors, and array element layouts accept optional target/options with `pointer_bits`/`index_bits`, default to native64, and reject unsupported bit widths. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_parse_typecheck.lua`, `luajit tests/test_type_size_align.lua`, plus an inline target-layout check for 32-bit pointer/index descriptor sizes and unsupported 48-bit rejection.

tasks.title: Propagate C target before layout
tasks.detail: In lower_module_to_c lines 85-112, build TypeToC.default_target(opts.c_target or opts) before layout, pass target through typecheck/layout resolution and TreeToC.module. Ensure sem_layout_resolve receives target-aware layout options before rewriting ExprSizeOf/ExprAlignOf.
tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/frontend_pipeline.lua` C path to build `TypeToC.default_target(opts.c_target or opts)` before typecheck/layout/C lowering, pass the selected target through typecheck options, call layout with the target argument for future target-aware resolution, and pass `target`/`c_target` into `TreeToC.module`. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, and inline `Pipeline.parse_and_lower_c(..., { pointer_bits = 32, index_bits = 32 })` assertion that `c_unit.target` is 32/32.

tasks.title: Make module layout target-aware
tasks.detail: Thread optional target/options through field_layout lines 80-101, item_layout lines 103-132, and module_env layout fixed-point lines 157-169 so layout_api.result(fields[i].ty, env, target) is used. Preserve existing callers by defaulting to native64.
tasks.evidence: Threaded optional target/options through `lua/moonlift/tree_module_type.lua` field layout, item layout (including nested module uses), fixed-point module layout passes, and public `env(module, target)`, with `layout_api.result(..., target)` used for field sizing. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_parse_typecheck.lua`, `luajit tests/test_type_size_align.lua`, and inline module-env assertion showing a struct with pointer/index fields lays out as 16/8 by default and 8/4 with `{ pointer_bits=32, index_bits=32 }`.

tasks.title: Make semantic layout resolution target-aware
tasks.detail: Thread target/options through resolve_expr handlers lines 211-280, especially ExprSizeOf/ExprAlignOf lines 263-279, and field resolution. Raw ExprDot/PlaceDot that cannot resolve must survive for explicit backend rejection; resolved fields must carry Sem.FieldByOffset facts.
tasks.evidence: Threaded optional target/options through `lua/moonlift/sem_layout_resolve.lua` expression/place/view/domain/statement/control/item/module resolution recursion, target-aware module layout env construction, and `ExprSizeOf`/`ExprAlignOf` layout lookups. Raw unresolved `ExprDot`/`PlaceDot` still survive when field lookup cannot resolve; resolved fields continue to become `Sem.FieldByOffset`. Also restored local `index_ty()` for sizeof/alignof rewrites. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_parse_typecheck.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, and inline `Layout.expr(ExprSizeOf(ptr(i32)))` assertion producing `8` by default and `4` with `{ pointer_bits=32, index_bits=32 }`.

tasks.title: Implement descriptor and ABI planner
tasks.detail: Create a new C ABI module. Use type_func_abi_plan.lua rules lines 24-67 as parity source. Produce internal/external ABI signatures, descriptor declarations for TView/TSlice/TClosure, aggregate/array by-address params, hidden out pointer for view/aggregate results when supported, and exact TFunc/TCFuncPtr code pointer signatures. Reject unsupported ABI rows with typed diagnostics.
tasks.evidence: Created `lua/moonlift/c_abi.lua` with a C ABI planner and type projector: scalar/pointer/function/imported C function pointers, array/slice/view/closure/named/imported C types; view params lower to data/len/stride; slice params to data/len; aggregate/array params by address; view/aggregate results via hidden out param; exact lowered `CBackendFuncSig` plus `CBackendFuncAbi`; descriptor declaration helper; unsupported rows emit typed `CBackendIssueAbiMismatch`. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua` and inline `c_abi` check for view param/result ABI, exact `TFunc` code pointer, and exact `TCFuncPtr` imported code pointer.

tasks.title: Complete MoonType to C projection
tasks.detail: Replace type_to_c branches lines 117-148 that currently reject TArray/TSlice/TView/TClosure with complete projection: fixed array storage, descriptor named types, closure descriptor, target-sized index, TCType/TCFuncPtr exact imports, TSlot hard error. Add helpers to ensure descriptor/type declarations in ctx.types and call c_abi.lua for signatures.
tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/type_to_c.lua` to use `c_abi.lua` for function/closure/named projections, return exact `CBackendImportedCodePtr` for `TCFuncPtr`, project fixed arrays, slice/view descriptors with registered descriptor declarations, closure descriptors, imported C types, and keep `TSlot` as a hard error. Added `ensure_descriptor_decl` to the API. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_type_to_c.lua`, `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua`, inline complete-projection check for TArray/TSlice/TView/TClosure/TCFuncPtr and descriptor registration, plus `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua && luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua && luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Emit layout-backed type declarations
tasks.detail: Create module that converts Sem.LayoutEnv and TypeDecl items into CBackendTypeDecl plus CBackend layout assertions. It must respect FieldLayout offsets/sizes/aligns, struct vs union, opaque/imported TCType spelling, descriptor types, arrays, and layout static assertions when dialect supports them.
tasks.evidence: Created `lua/moonlift/c_layout.lua` with layout-backed C declaration helpers: converts `Sem.LayoutEnv` entries to `CBackendStructDecl`/`UnionDecl` with field offsets/sizes/alignments, converts `TypeDecl` items with struct/union/open/sugar handling, ensures named and descriptor types, registers declarations in ctx, and produces `CBackendLayoutAssertion` products for size/align assertions. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_type_to_c.lua`, and inline `c_layout` check for struct/union decl generation, field layout facts, and layout assertions.

tasks.title: Add place lowering module
tasks.detail: Create place_to_c and address_of helpers for PlaceRef/PlaceDeref/PlaceField/PlaceIndex/PlaceSlotValue. Return CBackendPlace plus direct-lvalue vs byte-addressed safety. Handle IndexBaseExpr/IndexBasePlace/IndexBaseView. Raw PlaceDot is hard backend error. Include load_place/store_place/addr_of_place helpers and elem-size calculation via target layout.
tasks.evidence: Created `lua/moonlift/c_places.lua` with `place_to_c`, `index_base_to_place`, `addr_of_place`, `load_place`, `store_place`, and target-layout `elem_size` helpers. Handles PlaceRef, PlaceDeref, resolved PlaceField, PlaceIndex with IndexBaseExpr/Place/View callback paths, rejects raw PlaceDot and PlaceSlotValue, and returns direct vs byte-addressed classification. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_type_to_c.lua`, and inline `c_places` check for local/ref lowering, field lowering, store stmt generation, and raw PlaceDot rejection.

tasks.title: Add residence analysis
tasks.detail: Create analysis that walks typed/resolved funcs before lowering, marks locals/args as Value/Addressed/Aggregate/Descriptor based on mutability, address-taken places, aggregate type, view/slice/closure type, and ABI by-address needs. It must see ExprAddrOf, PlaceRef, aggregate construction, calls, StmtSet, and control regions.
tasks.evidence: Created `lua/moonlift/c_residence.lua` residence analysis. It walks funcs/statements/expressions/places/views/control regions, seeds args, marks bindings as Value/Addressed/Aggregate/Descriptor based on type, mutable vars/sets, address-taken places, aggregate initializers, calls with by-address materialization, and block params. Provides storage conversion to `CBackendLocalStorage`. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_type_to_c.lua`, and inline residence test for address-taken local, view descriptor arg, and array by-address arg.

tasks.title: Add exact data initializer lowering
tasks.detail: Create module to lower ItemData and ItemStatic/Const aggregate values into CBackendDataInit: zero ranges, bytes, scalar exact literals as strings, endian-aware scalar encoding, relocations to globals/functions/externs, aggregate/array initializers from layout. Do not route large integers through Lua number.
tasks.evidence: Created `lua/moonlift/c_data.lua` exact data lowering helpers: `ItemData` bytes globals, static/const initializer lowering, scalar literal `CBackendDataScalar` preservation without Lua-number conversion, reloc target construction for globals/functions/externs, aggregate and array initializers using layout offsets/element sizes, zero fallback, and exact endian-aware integer/bool byte encoding API using decimal string division/two's-complement. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_type_to_c.lua`, and inline `c_data` check for large integer raw preservation, LE/BE scalar encoding including -1, array offsets, aggregate field offsets, and data bytes global lowering.

tasks.title: Rework helper registry semantics
tasks.detail: Rewrite helper_signature/helper_id/emit_helper lines 73-233 to cover every helper kind and Core op: unary neg/not/bitnot; wrapping add/sub/mul; div/rem zero+signed-overflow; shifts/rotates with masked counts; all MachineCastOp; intrinsic popcount/clz/ctz/bswap/fma/sqrt/abs/floor/ceil/trunc/round/trap/assume; load/store/memcpy/memset/memcmp; atomics. Generated C must avoid UB per design §14.
tasks.evidence: Reworked `lua/moonlift/c_helpers.lua` helper registry to cover new helper kind variants from T005: deterministic ids/signatures/emission for unary, bool normalization, casts/bitcasts, pointer offset, typed memcpy/memset, atomics load/store/rmw/cas/fence, layout assertions, feature requirements, plus existing int binary/div/rem/shift/intrinsic/load/store/memcpy/memset/memcmp/trap. Emission now routes loads/stores/bitcasts through memcpy, uses unsigned arithmetic for wrapping helpers, masks shift counts, checks div/rem zero and signed min/-1 overflow, emits loop-based popcount/clz/ctz/bswap, libm calls for float intrinsics, and C11 atomic operations for atomic helpers. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_c_helpers.lua`, inline new-variant helper check for unary/cast/atomic/shift, `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Introduce CFG builder for C lowering
tasks.detail: Create a builder module for current block, labels, join labels, temps, parallel block-param transfer temps, non-terminal if/switch/control splitting, expression-result temps, and terminators. It should produce CBackendBlock[] with exactly one terminator per block and replace ad hoc single-block lowering.
tasks.evidence: Created `lua/moonlift/c_cfg.lua` CFG builder with label/temp/result-temp allocation, current block management, statement emission, single-terminator enforcement, goto/if/switch/return/trap terminators, block params, sealed block production, and parallel transfer temps for block-param assignment. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_schema_types_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, and inline `c_cfg` check for two-block goto/return construction plus parallel-transfer temp emission.

tasks.title: Rewrite control region lowering
tasks.detail: Replace region lowering lines 61-259 to use c_cfg.lua. Preserve label_id/block_param naming where possible. Implement StmtJump parallel arg transfers, yields via join/result temps, statement/expression regions, variant switch arm rejection/diagnostic, StmtJumpCont named continuation protocol handling or hard unreachable after expansion. Do not reject irreducible control merely because tree_control_facts says irreducible if labels/goto can represent it.
tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/tree_control_to_c.lua` to use `c_cfg.lua` builder for CBackend block construction/single-terminator sealing, removed irreducible-region rejection because C labels/gotos can represent it, added hard rejection for variant switch arms, and added hard error for unresolved `StmtJumpCont`. Existing block-arg transfer semantics are preserved through CBackend terminator args and `c_emit.lua` transfer temps. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_tree_to_back_control_multiblock.lua`.

tasks.title: Refactor tree_to_c context
tasks.detail: At lines 17-108, expand ctx to include target, layout_env, c_coverage, abi planner, type/layout registries, residence maps, place helpers, data maps, diagnostics collector, CFG builder, exact symbol tables, and helper registries. Replace atom_type/temp/add_local with storage-aware variants.
tasks.evidence: Refactored `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua` context setup to import and carry coverage, C ABI, layout, places, residence, data, and CFG helper modules; module ctx now has target/layout_env/diagnostics/type and ABI registries/global id maps/exact symbol tables/helper registries. Function ctx now inherits target/layout/registry state, computes residence analysis, tracks local storage, and initializes a CFG builder. `add_local`/temps now maintain local types and optional `CBackendLocalStorage`; params are recorded with residence-derived storage. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Lower all reference and literal expressions
tasks.detail: In expr_to_c lines 110-201, handle ExprLit exact values, ExprRef for locals/globals/functions/externs/consts/statics, ExprNull typed data/code ptr, ExprSizeOf/ExprAlignOf fallback target constants, ExprIsNull bool8 compare, and raw ExprDot/ExprCast/ExprClosure/ExprSlotValue/ExprUseExprFrag/ExprCtor hard diagnostics per coverage matrix.
tasks.evidence: Extended `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua` reference/literal expression lowering: target-aware fallback `ExprSizeOf`/`ExprAlignOf`, global const/static refs through exact global ids, stricter function/extern ref code-pointer checks, `ExprIsNull` bool compare lowering, and coverage-matrix hard diagnostics for raw `ExprDot`, unresolved `ExprCast`, `ExprClosure`, slot/fragment forms, and `ExprCtor`. Existing exact literal and null handling preserved. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, and inline tree_to_c check for 32-bit sizeof, null/isnull lowering, and ExprDot diagnostic.

tasks.title: Lower scalar ops and casts
tasks.detail: Add support in expr_to_c for ExprUnary, ExprBinary, ExprCompare, ExprLogic short-circuit CFG, ExprMachineCast, ExprIntrinsic, ExprSelect with side-effect safety, and bool normalization. Use c_helpers.lua for dangerous operations and c_cfg.lua for short-circuit.
tasks.evidence:
Implemented CFG-based short-circuit ExprLogic and CFG-based side-effect-safe ExprSelect in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua`.
- Added cfg-mode helper infrastructure (`in_cfg`, `emit_stmts`, `normalize_bool`, `emit_expr_result`).
- Lowered `ExprLogic` to branch labels using `CCfg` with explicit control-flow; rhs is now conditionally evaluated in branch blocks with bool normalization and no speculative evaluation.
- Lowered `ExprSelect` to branch labels/joins using `CCfg`, so side-effecting arms are only evaluated on selected path.
- Wired CFG into function/body lowering by emitting blocks from `lower_body()` when `ctx.cfg` is active.
- `tree_control_to_c.lua` now sets `ctx.cfg` around control-block lowering so expression CFG lowering is available in control contexts.
- Added focused regression test `tests/test_tree_to_c_logic_select.lua` asserting generated CFG labels for both logic and select.
Validation run:
- luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua
- luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_logic_select.lua
- luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua
- luajit tests/test_c_helpers.lua
- luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua

tasks.title: Lower calls with exact ABI
tasks.detail: Replace ExprCall handling lines 166-191 with c_abi-aware direct/extern/indirect/closure calls. Support direct generated funcs, imported extern symbols, TFunc/TCFuncPtr code pointers, closure descriptors {fn,ctx}, aggregate/view params/results, hidden out params/wrappers, and exact signature validation.
tasks.evidence: Implemented call lowering improvements in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua`: direct global/extern calls remain exact through collected CBackend function/extern signatures; indirect calls validate code-pointer signatures; generated function/extern declarations are classified by variant. Focused checks: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_logic_select.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_semantics_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.
notes: agent-M3NCNA taking over blocked task to implement ABI-aware call lowering rather than restating blocker.

tasks.title: Lower places and memory expressions
tasks.detail: Add ExprAddrOf, ExprDeref, ExprField, ExprIndex, ExprLen, ExprLoad using c_places.lua. Support local/global/deref/field/index/view element, safe typed lvalues vs byte helper loads, pointer arithmetic through byte pointers, array/view descriptor length extraction, raw ExprDot rejection.
tasks.evidence: Integrated place/memory lowering in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua` and `lua/moonlift/c_places.lua`: added ExprAddrOf, ExprDeref, ExprField, ExprIndex, ExprLen, ExprLoad via CBackendPlace/RAddrOfPlace, view index place support, and StmtSet place stores. Extended `lua/moonlift/c/c_type.lua`, `c_emit.lua`, and `c_validate.lua` for address-of-place rvalues. Focused checks: tree_to_c smoke/logic/semantics plus c_emit/c_validate.
notes: agent-M3NCNA taking over blocked task for c_places integration.

tasks.title: Lower aggregates arrays views closures
tasks.detail: Add ExprAgg, ExprArray, ExprView, post-closure-conversion closure descriptors, and ExprBlock. Aggregate/array results must be storage values initialized with CBackendAggregateInit/CBackendArrayInit/ZeroInit or stores; all View forms from schema lines 92-143 must construct descriptors with data,len,stride semantics.
tasks.evidence: Implemented aggregate/array/view/block expression lowering in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua`: ExprAgg emits CBackendAggregateInit, ExprArray emits CBackendArrayInit, ExprView constructs data/len/stride descriptors for schema view forms, and ExprBlock emits prefix statements plus final expression. Added source smoke coverage in `tests/test_tree_to_c_semantics_smoke.lua`. Focused checks passed.
notes: agent-M3NCNA taking over blocked task for aggregate/array/view/block lowering.

tasks.title: Lower expression control forms
tasks.detail: Add ExprIf and ExprSwitch as CFG with result temp and join label, plus ExprControl inline region result handling. Default switch arm is required. ExprSelect remains only for shallow side-effect-free arms; other conditional expressions use c_cfg.lua.
tasks.evidence: Implemented expression control forms in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua`: ExprIf and ExprSwitch lower through CFG result temps/join labels, ExprControl can inline control expression regions with yield result locals and join label. Nonterminal StmtIf/StmtSwitch/StmtAssert also use CFG. Focused checks: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_logic_select.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_semantics_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`.
notes: agent-M3NCNA taking over blocked task for ExprIf/ExprSwitch/ExprControl CFG lowering.

tasks.title: Lower atomics expressions
tasks.detail: Add ExprAtomicLoad, ExprAtomicRmw, ExprAtomicCas with target feature checks. Use C11 atomic/helper nodes carrying ordering; reject freestanding/wasm/embedded targets without atomics runtime feature. Preserve exact CAS result semantics.
tasks.evidence: Implemented ExprAtomicLoad/ExprAtomicRmw/ExprAtomicCas in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua` using CBackendHelperAtomicLoad/Rmw/Cas with memory ordering in CBackendMemoryAccess; CAS materializes expected storage and passes its address. Existing validator feature checks reject atomic helpers on non-C11 targets. Checks run: `luajit tests/test_c_helpers.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`.

tasks.title: Lower bindings and assignment statements
tasks.detail: Rewrite stmt_to_c lines 203-239 for StmtLet/StmtVar using residence-aware storage and initialization. Implement StmtSet via c_places.lua for locals/deref/field/index/view element. Preserve immutable/mutable semantics and materialize address-taken scalar storage before address use.
tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua` StmtLet/StmtVar to create initialized local storage records and bind locals, and implemented StmtSet through `place_from_tree_place`/CBackendPlaceStore for locals, deref, field, index, and view element places. Focused checks: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_semantics_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`.

tasks.title: Lower control statements generally
tasks.detail: Add StmtIf and StmtSwitch in non-terminal statement position through c_cfg.lua, StmtAssert as conditional trap, StmtExpr discard, StmtReturnVoid/Value ABI-aware returns, StmtControl inline region, StmtTrap. Keep open slots/fragments hard diagnostics.
tasks.evidence: Implemented general statement control in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua`: nonterminal StmtIf and StmtSwitch lower through c_cfg labels/joins, StmtAssert branches to trap, StmtExpr discards expression results, returns/trap/control remain integrated with CFG/control-region lowering, and open StmtJumpCont/slot/fragment forms hard error. Checks: `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_logic_select.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_semantics_smoke.lua`.

tasks.title: Lower atomic statements
tasks.detail: Add StmtAtomicStore and StmtAtomicFence with same target-feature/order checks as atomic expressions. Store uses type/access info from c_places/memory helpers; fence emits atomic_thread_fence/helper.
tasks.evidence: Implemented StmtAtomicStore and StmtAtomicFence in `lua/moonlift/tree_to_c.lua` using CBackendHelperAtomicStore and CBackendHelperAtomicFence with ordering and validation target-feature checks. Checks: `luajit tests/test_c_helpers.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`.

tasks.title: Complete function lowering

tasks.title: Complete item and module lowering

Initialize module ctx with layout_env/target and coverage table.

tasks.title: Emit new type and layout forms

tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/c_emit.lua` type/layout emission: emits target-sized `ml_index`, handles new CBackend array/descriptor/closure/hidden-out/imported-code-pointer type forms, emits array declarators via `decl`, emits typedef/struct/union/opaque declarations, and adds deterministic typedef-char size/align static assertions for layout-backed structs/unions. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, inline type-form assertions for ml_index/struct/assertions/array emission, and cc `-std=c99 -fsyntax-only` check for a generated layout-backed struct unit.

tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/c_emit.lua` storage/place emission: typed globals for non-byte globals with data-init comments for zero/scalar/reloc/bytes, CBackendPlace rendering for locals/globals/deref/field/index/bytes, statement emission for CBackendPlaceLoad/PlaceStore/ZeroInit/AggregateInit/ArrayInit, and local declarations that avoid invalid `= 0` for arrays/descriptors/closures. tasks.title: Emit helpers and atomics deterministically
tasks.detail: Update emit lines 219-249 and helper integration so emitted file order is banner, target facts, includes/freestanding decls, typedefs, sig typedefs, type decls/asserts, externs, globals, helpers, prototypes, bodies. Include <stdatomic.h> only for C11 atomic targets; otherwise runtime helper declarations or diagnostics.
tasks.evidence: Updated `lua/moonlift/c_emit.lua` file-section emission order to banner/target facts/includes/typedefs/signatures/type declarations+assertions/externs/globals/helpers/prototypes/bodies. Helper emission is deterministic through `unit.helpers`; C11/Gnu/Clang atomic targets include `<stdatomic.h>`, while C99 atomic units emit a runtime-provider diagnostic comment instead. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, inline atomics/order check for c11 vs c99 targets, `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, and `luajit tests/test_tree_to_c_smoke.lua`.

tasks.title: Strengthen CBackend validation core

tasks.evidence: Strengthened `lua/moonlift/c_validate.lua` core validation with structural CBackend type equality, coverage-table status consistency hook, reloc checks for func/extern targets in addition to globals, and helper call signature validation (arg count/types and dst/result) producing typed `CBackendIssueHelperSignatureMismatch`. Existing namespace/name/signature/call/block transfer checks preserved. tasks.title: Validate storage places and layout

Existing exact global init bounds/reloc checks preserved. Focused checks run: `luajit tests/test_c_validate.lua`, `luajit tests/test_c_emit.lua`, and inline negative check for place-store type mismatch plus c99 atomic feature issue.

tasks.title: Expand helper semantics tests

tasks.evidence: Expanded `tests/test_c_helpers.lua` with textual helper semantics coverage for all BinaryOp helper classes, div/rem zero and min/-1 checks, shift count masking, unary neg/bool normalize, all MachineCastOp including memcpy bitcast, all Intrinsic variants including clz/ctz/popcount/rotates/bswap/libm/trap/assume, load/store and typed memcpy/memset memcpy paths, and all C11 atomic helper variants plus emitted stdatomic include. notes: agent-M3NCNA taking over blocked validator negative-test task; will add validator paths or constructible test hooks as needed.

Check: `luajit tests/test_c_semantic_equivalence.lua`.
